description_long: This is a single-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, compact layout. The exterior walls are primarily white, with wooden accents around doors and windows, and blue-tiled sections indicating bathrooms. The house features multiple rooms, including bedrooms, a living area, kitchen, and bathrooms, all visible through the open-plan design. Large windows and glass doors are present on both longer sides, allowing for ample natural light and easy access. The interior is finished with light-colored flooring and wooden furniture, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The house is designed for efficient use of space, suitable for urban neighborhoods or compact residential plots.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, wooden accents, and blue-tiled bathrooms. Features large windows, multiple rooms, and an open, efficient layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, living area, and clear visibility of bedrooms and bathrooms with blue-tiled sections.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, large windows, and the arrangement of rooms along the main corridor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entry, additional bedrooms, and the open-plan living space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the kitchen, living area, and the distribution of rooms along the house's length.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on both long sides
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a single door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
